learning_objective: After solving this problem, the student will be able to identify monotonic feasibility in minimize-the-maximum partition problems and apply binary search on the answer with a greedy check function.
prerequisites: understanding of O(log N) search spaces
story_direction: A research institute has N experiments that must run in a fixed order. The director has K identical labs and must assign each experiment to a lab such that each lab gets a contiguous block of experiments. The goal is to minimize the maximum total difficulty assigned to any single lab.
